title: avenochloa decora
intro: Avenochloa decora, also known as Avena sativa, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is commonly known as oat grass or wild oat and is often used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Avenochloa decora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Avenochloa decora can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
